general.name: Jamf Connect Menu SG
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>FB717181-5B5D-4D28-9417-865B376C89EC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>FB717181-5B5D-4D28-9417-865B376C89EC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Menu SG</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Settings</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3D70D1A1-1340-4CF0-BA8A-89432C86EC46</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3D70D1A1-1340-4CF0-BA8A-89432C86EC46</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.connect</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>HiddenMenuItems</key><array><string>preferences</string><string>quit</string></array><key>Appearance</key><dict><key>AlternateBranding</key><false/></dict><key>CustomMenuItems</key><dict><key>gethelp</key><string>Support Hub</string></dict><key>IdPSettings</key><dict><key>Provider</key><string>Azure</string><key>ROPGID</key><string>d6248be3-a81c-4a12-b8b3-ca959a44ae66</string><key>TenantID</key><string>ef6f731e-41f8-43bd-9df6-8982a75c2f24</string></dict><key>Keychain</key><dict><key>InternetItems</key><dict/><key>PasswordItems</key><dict/></dict><key>PasswordPolicies</key><dict><key>CheckOnNetworkChange</key><true/><key>ExpirationCountdownStartDay</key><integer>15</integer><key>ExpirationNotificationStartDay</key><integer>5</integer><key>NetworkCheck</key><integer>15</integer><key>SyncPasswordsMessage</key><string>Your computer and Microsoft passwords do not match. Please verify the computer password so that the Microsoft password can be applied to your account</string></dict><key>SignIn</key><dict><key>AutoAuthenticate</key><true/><key>SignInLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/SGLogo.png</string><key>UsernameLabel</key><string>Email Address</string><key>WindowTitle</key><string>Sign In</string></dict><key>TemporaryUserPermissions</key><dict><key>TemporaryUserPromotion</key><true/><key>UserPromotionDuration</key><integer>10</integer><key>UserPromotionReason</key><true/><key>UserPromotionTimer</key><true/><key>VerifyUserPromotion</key><false/></dict><key>UserHelp</key><dict><key>HelpOptions</key><string>https://saks.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portals</string><key>HelpType</key><string>URL</string></dict><key>WebBrowser</key><dict><key>BrowserSelection</key><string>Google Chrome</string></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
